description: The local rails application is not running on port 8080 (Zammad is answering instead), and the agent is instructed not to start long-running servers manually.
proposed_resolution: The human operator must start the application using `just dev` or `bin/dev` before the agent can execute UI tests.

description: The agent that previously attempted to run the UI tests failed because it fell back to curl and web_fetch instead of using Playwright.
proposed_resolution: Ensure the UI test agent has the necessary browser tools (such as Playwright MCP or `browser_subagent`) to login and interact with the page.
